texto: I had a dream of music and art and the big city in which I would get lost, where no one would know me and I wouldn't know anyone, where I would work at some ordinary job, and if one day I got up in the morning and decided I wasn't going to go to work anymore, no one would ask questions.
explicacao: Citação de Ori Gersht sobre temas ligados a motivacao. “I had a dream of music and art and the big city in which I would get lost, where no one would kno…” articula motivacao, work, music em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como bom-dia e trabalho.
